content: AlphaFold 3 achieves 76.4% success rate (ligand RMSD < 2.0 Å) in blind protein-ligand docking, significantly outperforming AutoDock Vina (52.1%) and other baseline methods.
Visualization of protein-ligand complex predictions showing accurate reproduction of key interactions including hydrogen bonding, hydrophobic contacts, and π-stacking.

The diffusion-based architecture demonstrates superior performance across diverse biomolecular complexes including protein-nucleic acid interactions (85.2% accuracy) and antibody-antigen complexes (78.9% accuracy).
Training convergence curve showing stable learning and rapid convergence of the diffusion model compared to previous architecture.
Ablation studies confirm the importance of diffusion module and PairFormer architecture, with removal of either component resulting in >15% performance degradation.
